generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations.
Move implementation-level references from type annexes to implementation annexes.
Remove clauses with invalid data type comparisons (e.g., numeric comparisons on Booleans).
Prioritize repairs that utilize visible AADL features or declared helpers.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Ensure component type and implementation annexes are used for appropriate contract scopes.
anti_patterns: Avoid adding architecture to fix AGREE errors; focus on contract corrections.
Do not attempt to force invalid expressions by altering the AADL model.
irrelevant_topics: AADL structural extraction details (component types, implementations, features)
